commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can reject reserved generated-output basenames before WalkDir descends and add focused regression tests; contributor real behavior proof is otherwise sufficient.; Needs attention: The patch improves the symlink disclosure bug but still leaves a concrete partial-publish side-effect gap for generated-output directories.; Review finding: [P2] Reject reserved output directories before up... (sha=7c5bc2f4decac50eae16acc46c070462979f71b4)
commands.review_summary:
The branch rejects symlinked and non-regular artifact publish bundle entries, adds CLI regression coverage, updates artifact docs, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source. A bundle containing artifact-manifest.json/child or published-artifacts.md/child is still traversed because directory entries return before reserved-name handling, and hosted backends publish before generated-file writes fail.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can reject reserved generated-output basenames before WalkDir descends and add focused regression tests; contributor real behavior proof is otherwise sufficient.

target.title: fix: reject unsafe artifact publish entries
target.body:
## Summary

- reject symlinks and other non-regular artifact bundle entries during enumeration
- perform rejection before skipping or writing generated manifest and Markdown filenames
- cover ordinary artifact links plus symlinked generated-output names

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/495

## Verification

- `go test -race ./...`
- `go vet ./...`
- `bash scripts/check-docs.sh`
- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- live CLI smoke: local publish of a bundle containing an outside-file symlink exited 2, reported the symlink, created no manifest or Markdown, and left the outside file unchanged
- autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings

Sanitized live terminal output:

```text
$ crabbox artifacts publish --dir /tmp/redacted/bundle --storage local
read artifact directory: artifact bundle contains symlink: screenshot.png
$ verify-result
exit=2 no_side_effects=true outside_unchanged=true
```

## Security

The selected artifact directory now acts as a regular-file-only publication boundary. Existing regular generated metadata files remain skipped during enumeration and are regenerated normally.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
